message:
feat(core): statement reuse telemetry and regression tests

Add structured logging system for statement reuse via
log_statement_reuse_event() emitting tracing::info! to the
fsqlite.statement_reuse target. Helper functions
statement_reuse_log_context_from_env() and format_schema_identity()
support RUN_ID/SCENARIO_ID env vars and cookie+generation formatting.

Instrumentation points added at: parse cache hits/misses, parse errors,
compiled cache hits/misses/invalidations/errors, execution
success/failure, schema cookie invalidation, and prepared statement
schema validation failures.

PreparedStatement now stores sql: String for diagnostics;
compile_and_wrap() signature changed to accept sql: &str.
refresh_parse_cache_if_needed() now takes sql: &str for schema
invalidation logging. New helper methods: pager_backend_label(),
current_schema_identity(), backend_identity().

Compile timing is always called (not gated behind profile_enabled)
for telemetry compile_ns.

Minor code quality: compute_index_stat_string_in_txn and
validate_page_ownership_in_txn changed to static methods,
walk_integrity_overflow_chain txn parameter relaxed to &dyn,
flatten_expr_tree match arm reordering, clippy suppressions.

Concurrent writer test rewritten for backend-agnostic stale-write
detection using is_transient(). Six new regression tests: ad-hoc
hot-path metrics, prepared trigger constraints, binding mismatch
doesn't poison reuse, file-backed trace contract, plus 2 proptests
for schema invalidation and insertion order.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
